+----------------------------------+
|                                  |
|         +----------+             |
|         |  Node D  |             |
|         +----------+             |
|               ^                  |
|---------------+------+           |
|       +-------+------++          |
|       |              ||          |
|       |              ||          |
| +-----+----+    +-----+----+     |
| |  Node B  |    |  Node C  |     |
| +----------+    +----------+     |
|       ^              |^          |
|       |              ||          |
|       |              ||          |
|       |              ||          |
|       |              ||          |
|       +-------+------++          |
|               |      |           |
|         +-----+----+ |           |
|         |  Node A  | |           |
|         +----------+ |           |
|                      |           |
|                      |           |
|                      |           |
|---[  Left Group  ]---+           |
|                                  |
+--------[  Right Group  ]---------+
